items.title: No, Drummond isn’t nearly as impactful or better than Mitch Rob
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
No, Drummond isn’t nearly as impactful or better than Mitch Rob

Yes, it can be argued that Drummond at $2.5 million (allowing NY to stay below the second apron) is a better allocation of resources than Mitch at $15M

No, Drummond is not a plus defender 

Yes, Drummond can rebound and set screens
